title: Import data into an existing group HELP!
excerpt: I want to import new data into a particular group on my board instead of  creating an entirely new separate group. Is this possibly? If not, then can I merge two groups together?

posts.author: mergersandacq (Jocelyn G)
posts.cookedHtml: I want to import new data into a particular group on my board instead of creating an entirely new separate group. Is this possibly? If not, then can I merge two groups together?

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@mergersandacq

It is not exactly possible to merge groups. What is possible is to select all the items in one group (up to 500 at a time) and move the to another group.

Jim - The Monday Man
Column Magic - the magical columns toolbox app

posts.author: jamespatten (James Patten)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @mergersandacq !

If you’re still looking for this, then you can import an Excel/CSV into an existing group with the monday app Data Importer

I’ve put together a tutorial specifically for this too.

I hope it helps, do feel free to reach out if any questions!

James
